About Webescapade

A modern web design & AI development studio, created by Marc Teleki.

Marc has been involved in web design since 2004, beginning with Flash-based websites and interactive digital experiences. As technology evolved he moved into HTML5 and modern platforms, crafting dynamic, flexible and engaging websites for a wide range of clients.

Today, Webescapade focuses on the next stage of the web: sites enhanced by artificial intelligence. Beautiful to look at, smooth to use, easy for clients to update — and ready for the future of AI-powered online experiences.

2004
Flash & interactive design Animated, experimental digital experiences.
2010
HTML5 & modern platforms Dynamic, responsive, client-friendly websites.
Today
AI-powered web development Editable sites with chat, voice, automation & smart content.
What I do

Services built for the AI era.

From first concept to deployment — modern websites that are intelligent, editable and ready to grow.

AI-Powered Website Design

Striking, modern websites designed and built with AI-assisted workflows for speed and polish.

Portfolio & Business Sites

AI website features

What a modern website can do for you.

Every Webescapade site can be enhanced with intelligent features that work around the clock.

💬

AI Chat Assistants

Answer questions and guide visitors instantly, day and night.

🎙️

Voice Interaction

Let users talk to your site for a hands-free experience.

📅

Smart Booking Forms

Take reservations and appointments without the back-and-forth.

🛟

Support Automation

Handle common requests automatically and free up your time.

✏️

Editable Sections

Update text and images yourself, whenever you need to.

🧩

Dynamic Content Blocks

Flexible blocks that adapt to new offers, news and pages.

🎯

Lead Capture

Turn visitors into enquiries with smart, friendly forms.

🔗

CRM Integration

Send leads straight into the tools your business already uses.
